description: The casting of lead sling bullets ensured the slinger a consistency of ammo size and weight, as well as added aerodynamic properties to the projectiles that allowed for greater range and accuracy.
requirementsTooltip: Unlocked in Town Phase. Requires “Forging” or “Metallurgy.”
tooltip:
[font="sans-bold-14"]• Slingers +20% pierce attack damage.
• Slingers +4 projectile range.[/font]
